content.content:
I found a likely match but need one detail before I act.

Matches for "Dental check-up":
- Event id: 5
  - Title: Dentist Appointment
  - When: 2024-05-18 09:00 — 2024-05-18 10:00 (1 hour)
  - Location: Downtown Dental Clinic
  - Participants: emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com
  - Description: Regular dental check-up.

Is this the event you mean by "Dental check-up"? If so, you asked to reschedule it to start 2024-05-20 at 10:00 AM and keep the original duration. That would make the new time:
- New start: 2024-05-20 10:00
- New end: 2024-05-20 11:00 (keeps the 1-hour duration)

Before I reschedule, I need one thing from you:
- The clinic's email address to notify (the calendar event currently only lists your email). I can either:
  - Add the clinic email as a participant to the event (the calendar will then send a reschedule notification to them automatically), or
  - Send a separate email to the clinic and cc you.

Which do you prefer, and what is the clinic's email? Also confirm you want me to proceed with rescheduling event id 5 to 2024-05-20 10:00 — I'll then update the event and notify both you and the clinic.
